v3_preregister_updates.clarification: PASS = textbook QM holds = NO Orch-OR signal at SC 4Q GHZ scale. This is the EXPECTED null outcome. Orch-OR predicts neuronal-microtubule-scale OR, not SC-scale OR. The v3 test establishes the SC baseline precisely so that future cross-substrate tests (Quantinuum H-series ion, photonic GBS, biological microtubule) can detect deviations against a sound denominator.

v3_preregister_updates.reason: Original ion-vs-SC ratio is reframed as multi-stage: v3 establishes SC denominator on IBM, future v4 (Quantinuum H1/H2 if budget approved) measures ion numerator. Comparing v2-attempted-and-failed Forte 1 vs IBM v3 directly is unsound (different control stacks, no apples-to-apples).

v3_preregister_updates.v3_hard_cap_rationale: Open Plan free; if Open Plan exhausted, 1 min PAYG = $96, but 60 sec is enough for full 5-point sweep. Cap at $5 = ~3 sec PAYG buffer.
